tools.name: projects.vmmigrationProjectsLocationsGroupsAddGroupMigration
tools.description: Adds a MigratingVm to a Group.

tools.name: projects.vmmigrationProjectsLocationsGroupsCreate
tools.description: Creates a new Group in a given project and location.

tools.name: projects.vmmigrationProjectsLocationsGroupsList
tools.description: Lists Groups in a given project and location.

tools.name: projects.vmmigrationProjectsLocationsGroupsRemoveGroupMigration
tools.description: Removes a MigratingVm from a Group.

tools.name: projects.vmmigrationProjectsLocationsList
tools.description: Lists information about the supported locations for this service.

tools.name: projects.vmmigrationProjectsLocationsOperationsList
tools.description: Lists operations that match the specified filter in the request. If the server doesn't support this method, it returns `UNIMPLEMENTED`.

tools.name: projects.vmmigrationProjectsLocationsSourcesCreate
tools.description: Creates a new Source in a given project and location.

tools.name: projects.vmmigrationProjectsLocationsSourcesDatacenterConnectorsCreate
tools.description: Creates a new DatacenterConnector in a given Source.

tools.name: projects.vmmigrationProjectsLocationsSourcesDatacenterConnectorsList
tools.description: Lists DatacenterConnectors in a given Source.

tools.name: projects.vmmigrationProjectsLocationsSourcesDatacenterConnectorsUpgradeAppliance
tools.description: Upgrades the appliance relate to this DatacenterConnector to the in-place updateable version.

tools.name: projects.vmmigrationProjectsLocationsSourcesFetchInventory
tools.description: List remote source's inventory of VMs. The remote source is the onprem vCenter (remote in the sense it's not in Compute Engine). The inventory describes the list of existing VMs in that source. Note that this operation lists the VMs on the remote source, as opposed to listing the MigratingVms resources in the vmmigration service.

tools.name: projects.vmmigrationProjectsLocationsSourcesList
tools.description: Lists Sources in a given project and location.

tools.name: projects.vmmigrationProjectsLocationsSourcesMigratingVmsCloneJobsCreate
tools.description: Initiates a Clone of a specific migrating VM.

tools.name: projects.vmmigrationProjectsLocationsSourcesMigratingVmsCloneJobsList
tools.description: Lists CloneJobs of a given migrating VM.

tools.name: projects.vmmigrationProjectsLocationsSourcesMigratingVmsCreate
tools.description: Creates a new MigratingVm in a given Source.

tools.name: projects.vmmigrationProjectsLocationsSourcesMigratingVmsCutoverJobsCancel
tools.description: Initiates the cancellation of a running cutover job.

tools.name: projects.vmmigrationProjectsLocationsSourcesMigratingVmsCutoverJobsCreate
tools.description: Initiates a Cutover of a specific migrating VM. The returned LRO is completed when the cutover job resource is created and the job is initiated.

tools.name: projects.vmmigrationProjectsLocationsSourcesMigratingVmsCutoverJobsList
tools.description: Lists CutoverJobs of a given migrating VM.

tools.name: projects.vmmigrationProjectsLocationsSourcesMigratingVmsFinalizeMigration
tools.description: Marks a migration as completed, deleting migration resources that are no longer being used. Only applicable after cutover is done.

tools.name: projects.vmmigrationProjectsLocationsSourcesMigratingVmsList
tools.description: Lists MigratingVms in a given Source.

tools.name: projects.vmmigrationProjectsLocationsSourcesMigratingVmsPauseMigration
tools.description: Pauses a migration for a VM. If cycle tasks are running they will be cancelled, preserving source task data. Further replication cycles will not be triggered while the VM is paused.

tools.name: projects.vmmigrationProjectsLocationsSourcesMigratingVmsReplicationCyclesList
tools.description: Lists ReplicationCycles in a given MigratingVM.

tools.name: projects.vmmigrationProjectsLocationsSourcesMigratingVmsResumeMigration
tools.description: Resumes a migration for a VM. When called on a paused migration, will start the process of uploading data and creating snapshots; when called on a completed cut-over migration, will update the migration to active state and start the process of uploading data and creating snapshots.

tools.name: projects.vmmigrationProjectsLocationsSourcesMigratingVmsStartMigration
tools.description: Starts migration for a VM. Starts the process of uploading data and creating snapshots, in replication cycles scheduled by the policy.

tools.name: projects.vmmigrationProjectsLocationsSourcesUtilizationReportsCreate
tools.description: Creates a new UtilizationReport.

tools.name: projects.vmmigrationProjectsLocationsSourcesUtilizationReportsList
tools.description: Lists Utilization Reports of the given Source.

tools.name: projects.vmmigrationProjectsLocationsTargetProjectsCreate
tools.description: Creates a new TargetProject in a given project. NOTE: TargetProject is a global resource; hence the only supported value for location is `global`.

tools.name: projects.vmmigrationProjectsLocationsTargetProjectsDelete
tools.description: Deletes a single TargetProject. NOTE: TargetProject is a global resource; hence the only supported value for location is `global`.

tools.name: projects.vmmigrationProjectsLocationsTargetProjectsGet
tools.description: Gets details of a single TargetProject. NOTE: TargetProject is a global resource; hence the only supported value for location is `global`.

tools.name: projects.vmmigrationProjectsLocationsTargetProjectsList
tools.description: Lists TargetProjects in a given project. NOTE: TargetProject is a global resource; hence the only supported value for location is `global`.

tools.name: projects.vmmigrationProjectsLocationsTargetProjectsPatch
tools.description: Updates the parameters of a single TargetProject. NOTE: TargetProject is a global resource; hence the only supported value for location is `global`.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
